name: Kathy Laub
body: Hi Lyla and family! We wanted to let you know that you have a very dear kind woman from Haiti praying for you! She lives on New York and was taking care of my father-in-law. She is a prayer warrior and we keep in touch with. Here are her texts about you, Lyla:"Last night i saw the text,immediately i started to pray for that little girl,may The Lord answer our prayer:Blessed be The Lord oh my soul..."Then she broke into French:"Je continuerai a prier pour cette fille la." ("I will continue to pray for this girl")"Souviens-tu que dit la Bible dans romains 8v37 au 39 Ni la hauteur,ni la profondeur,ni aucune autre creature ne pourra nous separer de l'amour de Dieu manifeste en Jesuss-Christ notre Seigneur... Amen,Amen" ("Remember What the Bible says in Romans 8:37 -39 neither height nor depth, nor any creature will be able to separate us from the love of God evident in Jesus Christ our Lord...Amen Amen")So there are prayers in French going up to the Lord for you Lyla!

name: Suzanne Hale
body: Hey Lyla,It's Suzanne from Texas, Courtney Shaw's mom. I just want you to know I have been praying for you and will continue to pray for you and your whole family. Courtney has kept me up on what all you are going through and I just want to tell you I'm so proud of you for being a trooper and hanging in there. I know you are surrounded by many that love you so much and that many people all over the place are praying for you. Sending you a big hug and trusting God to continue to be with you on this journey.Love, Aunt Suzanne
